description.en:
You reposition a grappled creature to shield yourself from damage.

DC Tip: If the triggering Attack involved a Save (as with a Dynamic Attack Save) that moves you or your Grapple target out of your reach, you can still perform this Maneuver to resolve the damage (as if it the Hit happens moments before the forced movement).

**Trigger:** A creature that's not Grappled by you Hits you with an Attack.

**Reaction:** Make a Martial Check against the Grappled target's Might Save. **Check Success:** The damage from the Attack is shared by you and the Grappled creature, and you can move the Grappled creature to any Space adjacent to you immediately afterwards.
description.ru:
You reposition a grappled creature to shield yourself from damage.

DC Tip: If the triggering Attack involved a Save (as with a Dynamic Attack Save) that moves you or your Grapple target out of your reach, you can still perform this Maneuver to resolve the damage (as if it the Hit happens moments before the forced movement).

**Trigger:** A creature that's not Grappled by you Hits you with an Attack.

**Reaction:** Make a Martial Check against the Grappled target's Might Save. **Check Success:** The damage from the Attack is shared by you and the Grappled creature, and you can move the Grappled creature to any Space adjacent to you immediately afterwards.

description.en: After you complete the Reaction, you switch places with the Grappled target. This movement doesn't provoke Opportunity Attacks against either you or the target.
description.ru: After you complete the Reaction, you switch places with the Grappled target. This movement doesn't provoke Opportunity Attacks against either you or the target.

description.en: Your portion of the shared damage is reduced to 0.
description.ru: Your portion of the shared damage is reduced to 0.

description.en: The Grappled creature takes all the damage from the Attack instead.
description.ru: The Grappled creature takes all the damage from the Attack instead.

description.en:
You stand firm against an attack.

**Trigger:** A target you can see within range (including yourself) is targeted by an Attack against its AD.

**Reaction:** You grant the target a **+5** bonus to its AD against this Attack.
description.ru:
You stand firm against an attack.

**Trigger:** A target you can see within range (including yourself) is targeted by an Attack against its AD.

**Reaction:** You grant the target a **+5** bonus to its AD against this Attack.

range.en: Self (or 1 Space if wielding a Shield)
range.ru: Self (or 1 Space if wielding a Shield)

description.en: You can target 1 additional creature within range that's also targeted by the same Attack.
description.ru: You can target 1 additional creature within range that's also targeted by the same Attack.

description.en: If the Attacker is within 1 Space of you, they make a Physical Save. **Save Failure:** The Attacker becomes Grappled by you once the Attack is resolved.
description.ru: If the Attacker is within 1 Space of you, they make a Physical Save. **Save Failure:** The Attacker becomes Grappled by you once the Attack is resolved.

description.en:
You swing wide to attack targets around you.

Make an Area Martial Attack against the AD of every target within range. **Hit:** The target takes the damage of your Weapon or Unarmed Strike.

**Reach Weapon:** If you have a Reach Weapon, you can extend the Point of Origin 1 Space away from you. The Arc must still be facing away from you.
description.ru:
You swing wide to attack targets around you.

Make an Area Martial Attack against the AD of every target within range. **Hit:** The target takes the damage of your Weapon or Unarmed Strike.

**Reach Weapon:** If you have a Reach Weapon, you can extend the Point of Origin 1 Space away from you. The Arc must still be facing away from you.

description.en: The damage increases by 1.
description.ru: The damage increases by 1.

description.en: The Arc increases by 1 Space.
description.ru: The Arc increases by 1 Space.

description.en: You can choose 1 target in the area to avoid with the Attack.
description.ru: You can choose 1 target in the area to avoid with the Attack.

description.en:
You push through an attack.

**Trigger:** A target you can see within range (including yourself) is Hit by an Attack.

**Reaction:** The target takes **1** less damage from the Attack.
description.ru:
You push through an attack.

**Trigger:** A target you can see within range (including yourself) is Hit by an Attack.

**Reaction:** The target takes **1** less damage from the Attack.

range.en: Self (or 1 Space if wielding a Shield)
range.ru: Self (or 1 Space if wielding a Shield)

description.en: The target takes **1** less damage from the Attack.
description.ru: The target takes **1** less damage from the Attack.

description.en: The target isn't Vulnerable to damage from the Attack.
description.ru: The target isn't Vulnerable to damage from the Attack.

description.en: After the Attack, if the Attacker is within 1 Space of you or the target, they make a Might Save against your Save DC. **Save Failure:** They are pushed 1 Space away. **Save Failure (each 5):** +1 Space pushed.
description.ru: After the Attack, if the Attacker is within 1 Space of you or the target, they make a Might Save against your Save DC. **Save Failure:** They are pushed 1 Space away. **Save Failure (each 5):** +1 Space pushed.

description.en:
The force of your Attack pushes the target away.

Make a Melee Martial Attack against the PD of a target within range, and it makes a Might Save against your Save DC. **Hit:** The target takes the damage of your Weapon or Unarmed Strike. **Save Failure:** The target is pushed 1 Space away from you. **Save Failure (each 5):** The target is pushed up to 1 additional Space.

**Knock Prone:** After the result, you can choose to reduce the total distance a target is pushed by 1 Space to knock them **Prone** instead.

**Airborne:** When you choose to push them upward into the air, the distance they are pushed is halved.
description.ru:
The force of your Attack pushes the target away.

Make a Melee Martial Attack against the PD of a target within range, and it makes a Might Save against your Save DC. **Hit:** The target takes the damage of your Weapon or Unarmed Strike. **Save Failure:** The target is pushed 1 Space away from you. **Save Failure (each 5):** The target is pushed up to 1 additional Space.

**Knock Prone:** After the result, you can choose to reduce the total distance a target is pushed by 1 Space to knock them **Prone** instead.

**Airborne:** When you choose to push them upward into the air, the distance they are pushed is halved.

description.en: The distance pushed increases by 1 Space.
description.ru: The distance pushed increases by 1 Space.

description.en: If the target collides with another creature as part of this movement, they both take Collision Damage as normal, and the creature it collides with must make a Might Save against your Save DC. **Save Failure:** The target is knocked **Prone**. **Save Failure (each 5):** The target is also pushed 1 Space away from you.
description.ru: If the target collides with another creature as part of this movement, they both take Collision Damage as normal, and the creature it collides with must make a Might Save against your Save DC. **Save Failure:** The target is knocked **Prone**. **Save Failure (each 5):** The target is also pushed 1 Space away from you.

description.en:
You perform a powerful jump.

When you take the **Extend Jump** Action, you can add the following Maneuver Enhancements. When you add a Maneuver Enhancement (or perform the Action using SP), you are considered to be performing a Maneuver.

**Stamina Action:** You can now spend **1 SP** instead of **1 AP** to perform the **Extend Jump** Action.

*Extend Jump (Action)*

When you perform a Jump, you can spend **1 AP** to increase your Jump Distance for the Jump. Make a **DC 10** Acrobatics Check. **Failure:** Your Jump Distance increases by 1. **Success:** Your Jump Distance increases by 2. **Success (each 5):** **+1** Jump Distance.

DC Tip: Remember, your Long Jump Distance equals your Jump Distance in Spaces, and your High Jump distance equals your Jump Distance in feet.
description.ru:
You perform a powerful jump.

When you take the **Extend Jump** Action, you can add the following Maneuver Enhancements. When you add a Maneuver Enhancement (or perform the Action using SP), you are considered to be performing a Maneuver.

**Stamina Action:** You can now spend **1 SP** instead of **1 AP** to perform the **Extend Jump** Action.

*Extend Jump (Action)*

When you perform a Jump, you can spend **1 AP** to increase your Jump Distance for the Jump. Make a **DC 10** Acrobatics Check. **Failure:** Your Jump Distance increases by 1. **Success:** Your Jump Distance increases by 2. **Success (each 5):** **+1** Jump Distance.

DC Tip: Remember, your Long Jump Distance equals your Jump Distance in Spaces, and your High Jump distance equals your Jump Distance in feet.

description.en: If performing a Standing Jump, your Jump Distances is not halved.
description.ru: If performing a Standing Jump, your Jump Distances is not halved.

description.en: Your Jump Distance is increased by 2 for the Jump.
description.ru: Your Jump Distance is increased by 2 for the Jump.

description.en: You reduce any damage from falling by 2 for the Jump.
description.ru: You reduce any damage from falling by 2 for the Jump.

description.en:
You perform a powerful intimidate.

When you take the Intimidate Action, you can add the following Maneuver Enhancements. When you add a Maneuver Enhancement, you are considered to be performing a Maneuver.

*Intimidate (Action)*

You can spend **1 AP** to attempt to intimidate a creature that can see or hear you within 10 Spaces. Make an Intimidation Check contested by the target's Charisma Save. **Success:** The target is **Intimidated** by you for 1 Round.
description.ru:
You perform a powerful intimidate.

When you take the Intimidate Action, you can add the following Maneuver Enhancements. When you add a Maneuver Enhancement, you are considered to be performing a Maneuver.

*Intimidate (Action)*

You can spend **1 AP** to attempt to intimidate a creature that can see or hear you within 10 Spaces. Make an Intimidation Check contested by the target's Charisma Save. **Success:** The target is **Intimidated** by you for 1 Round.

description.en: The duration increases to 1 minute but each creature makes a Repeated Save.
description.ru: The duration increases to 1 minute but each creature makes a Repeated Save.

description.en: The range increases by 5 Spaces.
description.ru: The range increases by 5 Spaces.

description.en: Targets are **Frightened** instead.
description.ru: Targets are **Frightened** instead.

description.en: You instead target each creature of your choice within 5 Spaces that can see or hear you. When you choose this Enhancement, the cost of all other Enhancements (except **Sustained**) is doubled.
description.ru: You instead target each creature of your choice within 5 Spaces that can see or hear you. When you choose this Enhancement, the cost of all other Enhancements (except **Sustained**) is doubled.

description.en:
When you take the Pass Through Action, you can add the following Maneuver Enhancements. When you add a Maneuver Enhancement (or perform the Action using SP), you are considered to be performing a Maneuver.

**Stamina Action:** You can now spend **1 SP** instead of **1 AP** to perform the **Pass Through** Action.

*Pass Through*

You can spend **1 AP** to attempt to move through a Space occupied by a hostile creature that's within 1 size of you. Make a contested Martial Check against the target. **Success:** You can move through the creature's Space as if it were Difficult Terrain (**Slowed** while moving through the area). **Success (5):** You can move through the creature's space without it counting as Difficult Terrain.
description.ru:
When you take the Pass Through Action, you can add the following Maneuver Enhancements. When you add a Maneuver Enhancement (or perform the Action using SP), you are considered to be performing a Maneuver.

**Stamina Action:** You can now spend **1 SP** instead of **1 AP** to perform the **Pass Through** Action.

*Pass Through*

You can spend **1 AP** to attempt to move through a Space occupied by a hostile creature that's within 1 size of you. Make a contested Martial Check against the target. **Success:** You can move through the creature's Space as if it were Difficult Terrain (**Slowed** while moving through the area). **Success (5):** You can move through the creature's space without it counting as Difficult Terrain.

description.en: The creature's Space isn't considered Difficult Terrain for this movement. You don't provoke an Opportunity Attack from them if you leave their reach as part of the same movement.
description.ru: The creature's Space isn't considered Difficult Terrain for this movement. You don't provoke an Opportunity Attack from them if you leave their reach as part of the same movement.

description.en: If you Succeed, you can pull a willing creature within 1 Space of you to an unoccupied Space within 1 Space of the creature you pass.
description.ru: If you Succeed, you can pull a willing creature within 1 Space of you to an unoccupied Space within 1 Space of the creature you pass.

description.en:
You perform a powerful shove.

When you take the Shove Action, you can add the following Maneuver Enhancements. When you add a Maneuver Enhancement, you are considered to be performing a Maneuver.

*Shove (Action)*

You can spend **1 AP** to attempt to push a creature within 1 Space of you. Make an Athletics Check contested by the target's Martial Check. **Success:** You push the creature 1 Space away from you or to its left or right. **Success (each 5):** Push up to 1 additional Space.

**Knock Prone:** After the result, you can choose to reduce the total distance the target is pushed by 1 Space to knock them Prone ****instead.

DC Tip: If you shove a creature into a target, follow the rules for hitting the target in the **Collision** section.
description.ru:
You perform a powerful shove.

When you take the Shove Action, you can add the following Maneuver Enhancements. When you add a Maneuver Enhancement, you are considered to be performing a Maneuver.

*Shove (Action)*

You can spend **1 AP** to attempt to push a creature within 1 Space of you. Make an Athletics Check contested by the target's Martial Check. **Success:** You push the creature 1 Space away from you or to its left or right. **Success (each 5):** Push up to 1 additional Space.

**Knock Prone:** After the result, you can choose to reduce the total distance the target is pushed by 1 Space to knock them Prone ****instead.

DC Tip: If you shove a creature into a target, follow the rules for hitting the target in the **Collision** section.

description.en: The distance pushed increases by 1 Space.
description.ru: The distance pushed increases by 1 Space.

description.en: If you are **Prone**, you can stand up before or after making the Check without spending movement.
description.ru: If you are **Prone**, you can stand up before or after making the Check without spending movement.

description.en: You instead target each creature of your choice within a 1 Space Aura. When you choose this Enhancement, the cost of all other Enhancements (except **Stand Up**) is doubled.
description.ru: You instead target each creature of your choice within a 1 Space Aura. When you choose this Enhancement, the cost of all other Enhancements (except **Stand Up**) is doubled.

description.en:
You perform a powerful taunt.

When you take the **Taunt** Action, you can add the following Maneuver Enhancements. When you add a Maneuver Enhancement, you are considered to be performing a Maneuver.

*Taunt (Action)*

You can spend **1 AP** to attempt to taunt a creature that can see or hear you within 10 Spaces. Make an Influence Check contested by the target's Charisma Save. **Success:** The target is **Taunted** by you for 1 Round.
description.ru:
You perform a powerful taunt.

When you take the **Taunt** Action, you can add the following Maneuver Enhancements. When you add a Maneuver Enhancement, you are considered to be performing a Maneuver.

*Taunt (Action)*

You can spend **1 AP** to attempt to taunt a creature that can see or hear you within 10 Spaces. Make an Influence Check contested by the target's Charisma Save. **Success:** The target is **Taunted** by you for 1 Round.

description.en: The duration increases to 1 minute but each creature makes a Repeated Save.
description.ru: The duration increases to 1 minute but each creature makes a Repeated Save.

description.en: The range increases by 5 Spaces.
description.ru: The range increases by 5 Spaces.

description.en: Creatures other than you have Resistance (Half) to damage dealt by the **Taunted** targets, provided the target isn't also **Taunted** by those creatures.
description.ru: Creatures other than you have Resistance (Half) to damage dealt by the **Taunted** targets, provided the target isn't also **Taunted** by those creatures.

description.en: You instead target each creature of your choice within 5 Spaces that can see or hear you. When you choose this Enhancement, the cost of all other Enhancements (except **Sustained**) is doubled.
description.ru: You instead target each creature of your choice within 5 Spaces that can see or hear you. When you choose this Enhancement, the cost of all other Enhancements (except **Sustained**) is doubled.

description.en:
You run through a line of enemies.

You move in a Line up to your Speed. Make a Martial Check. Each creature within the Line must make a Martial Check contested against your Check when you attempt to move through its Space. **Contest Success:** You can move through the creature's Space. **Contest Failure:** You are unable to move through the creature's Space, preventing you from moving any further.

Example: You make a Martial Check with a result of 15. If your Speed is 5, you can move up to 5 Spaces in a straight Line. If there are 3 creatures in that Line, your Martial Check of 15 would be compared to a Martial Check each creature makes as you attempt to pass through their Space, one by one. If the first creature in your path gets a 15 or higher, you can't pass through their Space and stop moving.
description.ru:
You run through a line of enemies.

You move in a Line up to your Speed. Make a Martial Check. Each creature within the Line must make a Martial Check contested against your Check when you attempt to move through its Space. **Contest Success:** You can move through the creature's Space. **Contest Failure:** You are unable to move through the creature's Space, preventing you from moving any further.

Example: You make a Martial Check with a result of 15. If your Speed is 5, you can move up to 5 Spaces in a straight Line. If there are 3 creatures in that Line, your Martial Check of 15 would be compared to a Martial Check each creature makes as you attempt to pass through their Space, one by one. If the first creature in your path gets a 15 or higher, you can't pass through their Space and stop moving.

description.en: The Space of every creature who fails the contest isn't considered Difficult Terrain for this movement. You don't provoke an Opportunity Attack from them if you leave their reach as part of the same movement.
description.ru: The Space of every creature who fails the contest isn't considered Difficult Terrain for this movement. You don't provoke an Opportunity Attack from them if you leave their reach as part of the same movement.

description.en: Every creature who fails the contest is knocked **Prone**.
description.ru: Every creature who fails the contest is knocked **Prone**.

description.en:
A mid air strike.

Your Jump Distance increases by 2, you Jump up to your Jump Distance without spending movement (provided you can move), and make a Melee Martial Attack against a target within range at any point during your jump or where you land.

DC Tip: Remember, your Long Jump Distance equals your Jump Distance in Spaces, and your High Jump distance equals your Jump Distance in feet.

**Reaction:** You can spend an additional **1 SP** to perform this Maneuver as a Reaction to a creature being forcibly moved into a Space within your Jump Distance that's at least 1 Space above the ground.
description.ru:
A mid air strike.

Your Jump Distance increases by 2, you Jump up to your Jump Distance without spending movement (provided you can move), and make a Melee Martial Attack against a target within range at any point during your jump or where you land.

DC Tip: Remember, your Long Jump Distance equals your Jump Distance in Spaces, and your High Jump distance equals your Jump Distance in feet.

**Reaction:** You can spend an additional **1 SP** to perform this Maneuver as a Reaction to a creature being forcibly moved into a Space within your Jump Distance that's at least 1 Space above the ground.

description.en:
If the target is in the air, it makes a Physical Save against your Save DC. **Save Failure:** The creature is knocked downward 2 Spaces.

DC Tip: This knockback completely changes the direction the target was moving.
description.ru:
If the target is in the air, it makes a Physical Save against your Save DC. **Save Failure:** The creature is knocked downward 2 Spaces.

DC Tip: This knockback completely changes the direction the target was moving.

description.en: The creature makes a Physical Save against your Save DC. **Save Failure:** The creature falls **Prone**.
description.ru: The creature makes a Physical Save against your Save DC. **Save Failure:** The creature falls **Prone**.

description.en: All creatures within 1 Space of where you land must make a Physical Save against your Save DC. **Save Failure:** The creature falls **Prone**.
description.ru: All creatures within 1 Space of where you land must make a Physical Save against your Save DC. **Save Failure:** The creature falls **Prone**.

description.en:
You deflect an attack.

**Trigger:** A target you can see within range (including yourself) is targeted by an Attack against its PD.

**Reaction:** You grant the target a **+5** bonus to its PD against this Attack.
description.ru:
You deflect an attack.

**Trigger:** A target you can see within range (including yourself) is targeted by an Attack against its PD.

**Reaction:** You grant the target a **+5** bonus to its PD against this Attack.

range.en: Self (or 1 Space if wielding a Melee Weapon or Shield)
range.ru: Self (or 1 Space if wielding a Melee Weapon or Shield)

description.en: The Attacker's next Attack this turn against the target has DisADV.
description.ru: The Attacker's next Attack this turn against the target has DisADV.

description.en: If the Attacker is within 1 Space of you or the target, they make a Physical Save. **Save Failure:** The target drops the Weapon used for the Attack to the ground once the Attack is resolved. **Save Failure (5):** You gain possession of the Weapon, provided you have a free hand to hold it.
description.ru: If the Attacker is within 1 Space of you or the target, they make a Physical Save. **Save Failure:** The target drops the Weapon used for the Attack to the ground once the Attack is resolved. **Save Failure (5):** You gain possession of the Weapon, provided you have a free hand to hold it.

description.en:
You attack every creature in a line.

Make an Area Martial Attack with a Melee Weapon or Unarmed Strike against the AD of every target in a 4 Space Line. **Hit:** The target takes the damage of your Weapon or Unarmed Strike.

After Attacking, you can move to any Space within 1 Space of the area without provoking Opportunity Attacks from the targets and without spending your movement.

**Reach Weapon:** If you have a Reach Weapon, you can extend the Point of Origin 1 Space away from you. When you do, the Line must extend in a direction away from you.
description.ru:
You attack every creature in a line.

Make an Area Martial Attack with a Melee Weapon or Unarmed Strike against the AD of every target in a 4 Space Line. **Hit:** The target takes the damage of your Weapon or Unarmed Strike.

After Attacking, you can move to any Space within 1 Space of the area without provoking Opportunity Attacks from the targets and without spending your movement.

**Reach Weapon:** If you have a Reach Weapon, you can extend the Point of Origin 1 Space away from you. When you do, the Line must extend in a direction away from you.

description.en: The damage increases by **1**.
description.ru: The damage increases by **1**.

description.en: The length of the Line increases by 2 Spaces.
description.ru: The length of the Line increases by 2 Spaces.

description.en: Each target makes a Might Save. **Save** **Failure:** The target is pushed 1 Space horizontally out of the area in a direction of your choice. The target is moved 1 additional Space each time you use this Enhancement.
description.ru: Each target makes a Might Save. **Save** **Failure:** The target is pushed 1 Space horizontally out of the area in a direction of your choice. The target is moved 1 additional Space each time you use this Enhancement.

description.en:
You fire a powerful point-blank shot that pierces through creatures in a line.

Make an Area Martial Attack against the AD of every target within a 4 Space Line that's Point of Origin is within Range. The Line must extend away from you. **Hit:** The target takes the damage of your Weapon.
description.ru:
You fire a powerful point-blank shot that pierces through creatures in a line.

Make an Area Martial Attack against the AD of every target within a 4 Space Line that's Point of Origin is within Range. The Line must extend away from you. **Hit:** The target takes the damage of your Weapon.

description.en: The damage increases by **1**.
description.ru: The damage increases by **1**.

description.en: The length of the Line increases by 3 Spaces.
description.ru: The length of the Line increases by 3 Spaces.

description.en: The Attack ignores Cover but is blocked by 6 inches (15 cm) of wood or soft earth (dirt, mud, or sand), or 1 inch (25 mm) of metal or rock.
description.ru: The Attack ignores Cover but is blocked by 6 inches (15 cm) of wood or soft earth (dirt, mud, or sand), or 1 inch (25 mm) of metal or rock.

description.en:
You take damage for a nearby ally.

**Trigger:** A target you can see within range is Hit by an Attack.

**Reaction:** The damage of the Attack is shared between you and the target. The damage you take bypasses any Damage Reduction you have.
description.ru:
You take damage for a nearby ally.

**Trigger:** A target you can see within range is Hit by an Attack.

**Reaction:** The damage of the Attack is shared between you and the target. The damage you take bypasses any Damage Reduction you have.

description.en: You can target 1 additional creature within range that's also targeted by the same Attack.
description.ru: You can target 1 additional creature within range that's also targeted by the same Attack.

description.en: You become the target of the Attack taking all of the damage and effects instead of the target. If the Attack is accompanied by a Save (as with a **Dynamic Attack Save**), you make the Save instead of the target.
description.ru: You become the target of the Attack taking all of the damage and effects instead of the target. If the Attack is accompanied by a Save (as with a **Dynamic Attack Save**), you make the Save instead of the target.

description.en: You gain Resistance (Half) to any damage you take from using this Maneuver. The cost of this Enhancement increases by **1 SP** if you use the **Heroic Protect Enhancement**.
description.ru: You gain Resistance (Half) to any damage you take from using this Maneuver. The cost of this Enhancement increases by **1 SP** if you use the **Heroic Protect Enhancement**.

description.en:
You take a moment to catch your breath and refocus.

You attempt to spend Rest Points to regain HP equal to the Rest Points spent. Make a **DC 15** Martial Check. **Failure:** You can spend 1 Rest Point. **Success:** You can spend up to 2 Rest Points. **Success (each 5):** You can spend 1 additional Rest Point.
description.ru:
You take a moment to catch your breath and refocus.

You attempt to spend Rest Points to regain HP equal to the Rest Points spent. Make a **DC 15** Martial Check. **Failure:** You can spend 1 Rest Point. **Success:** You can spend up to 2 Rest Points. **Success (each 5):** You can spend 1 additional Rest Point.

description.en: You can spend 1 additional Rest Point.
description.ru: You can spend 1 additional Rest Point.

description.en: You can repeat a Save against an effect you are subjected to.
description.ru: You can repeat a Save against an effect you are subjected to.

description.en:
Sprint across the battlefield

Make a **DC 15** Martial Check. **Success:** You move up to twice your Speed ignoring Difficult Terrain. **Failure:** You move up to your Speed ignoring Difficult Terrain.

**Reaction:** You can spend an additional **1 SP** to perform this Maneuver as a Reaction at the end of a creature's Turn moving half as much as normal.
description.ru:
Sprint across the battlefield

Make a **DC 15** Martial Check. **Success:** You move up to twice your Speed ignoring Difficult Terrain. **Failure:** You move up to your Speed ignoring Difficult Terrain.

**Reaction:** You can spend an additional **1 SP** to perform this Maneuver as a Reaction at the end of a creature's Turn moving half as much as normal.

description.en: Each creature whose Space you attempt to move through must make a Martial Check against the result of your Martial Check. **Failure:** You move through their Space.
description.ru: Each creature whose Space you attempt to move through must make a Martial Check against the result of your Martial Check. **Failure:** You move through their Space.

description.en: A willing creature of your choice within 1 Space can move without spending its own movement, provided they're able to move and they end their movement within 1 Space of your destination.
description.ru: A willing creature of your choice within 1 Space can move without spending its own movement, provided they're able to move and they end their movement within 1 Space of your destination.

description.en:
You take a moment to catch your breath and refocus.

Make a **DC 10** Martial Check. **Failure:** You gain **1** Temp HP for 1 Round. **Success:** You gain **2** Temp HP for 1 Round. **Success (each 5):** **+1** Temp HP.
description.ru:
You take a moment to catch your breath and refocus.

Make a **DC 10** Martial Check. **Failure:** You gain **1** Temp HP for 1 Round. **Success:** You gain **2** Temp HP for 1 Round. **Success (each 5):** **+1** Temp HP.

description.en: You gain +**2** Temp HP.
description.ru: You gain +**2** Temp HP.

description.en: You gain ADV on Physical Saves for the duration.
description.ru: You gain ADV on Physical Saves for the duration.

description.en: You gain ADV on Mental Saves for the duration.
description.ru: You gain ADV on Mental Saves for the duration.

description.en:
You restrain a grappled target.

You make a Martial Check against the target's Repeated Physical Save. **Contest Success:** The target is **Restrained** until the Grapple ends or they succeed on their Repeated Save.

DC Tip: A creature can spend 1 AP to attempt to break a Grapple (see **Grapple Action** for more information).
description.ru:
You restrain a grappled target.

You make a Martial Check against the target's Repeated Physical Save. **Contest Success:** The target is **Restrained** until the Grapple ends or they succeed on their Repeated Save.

DC Tip: A creature can spend 1 AP to attempt to break a Grapple (see **Grapple Action** for more information).

description.en: The target also falls **Prone** (you don't fall **Prone** unless you choose to do so).
description.ru: The target also falls **Prone** (you don't fall **Prone** unless you choose to do so).

description.en: The target also can't speak or breathe until they are no longer **Restrained** by you.
description.ru: The target also can't speak or breathe until they are no longer **Restrained** by you.

description.en:
You cause a creature to bleed with the ferocity and precision of your attack.

Make a Martial Attack against the PD of a target within range, and it makes a Repeated Physical Save against your Save DC. **Hit:** The target takes the damage of your Weapon or Unarmed Strike. **Save Failure:** The target becomes **Impaired** for 1 minute or begins **Bleeding** (your choice).
description.ru:
You cause a creature to bleed with the ferocity and precision of your attack.

Make a Martial Attack against the PD of a target within range, and it makes a Repeated Physical Save against your Save DC. **Hit:** The target takes the damage of your Weapon or Unarmed Strike. **Save Failure:** The target becomes **Impaired** for 1 minute or begins **Bleeding** (your choice).

description.en: The target gains a stack of **Bleeding**.
description.ru: The target gains a stack of **Bleeding**.

description.en: The target gains a stack of **Impaired**.
description.ru: The target gains a stack of **Impaired**.

description.en: The target gains a stack of **Weakened**.
description.ru: The target gains a stack of **Weakened**.

description.en:
You avoid an enemy attack by quick repositioning.

**Trigger:** You're targeted by an Attack.

**Reaction:** You impose DisADV on the Attack against you. You can move 1 Space after the Attack, provided you stay within range of the Attack.
description.ru:
You avoid an enemy attack by quick repositioning.

**Trigger:** You're targeted by an Attack.

**Reaction:** You impose DisADV on the Attack against you. You can move 1 Space after the Attack, provided you stay within range of the Attack.

description.en: You gain ADV on any Saves imposed by the Attack.
description.ru: You gain ADV on any Saves imposed by the Attack.

description.en: Movement made as part of this Maneuver doesn't provoke Opportunity Attacks.
description.ru: Movement made as part of this Maneuver doesn't provoke Opportunity Attacks.

description.en: You can move up to your Speed instead of 1 Space and you no longer need to stay in range of the Attack.
description.ru: You can move up to your Speed instead of 1 Space and you no longer need to stay in range of the Attack.

description.en:
You slam a Grappled creature.

Make a Melee Martial Attack against the target's AD. **Hit:** The target takes 1 Bludgeoning damage.
description.ru:
You slam a Grappled creature.

Make a Melee Martial Attack against the target's AD. **Hit:** The target takes 1 Bludgeoning damage.

description.en: This Attack targets another creature you have **Grappled**.
description.ru: This Attack targets another creature you have **Grappled**.

description.en: You move up to your Speed pulling the **Grappled** creatures with you. 1 **Grappled** creature takes additional damage equal to the number of Spaces moved as you slam them.
description.ru: You move up to your Speed pulling the **Grappled** creatures with you. 1 **Grappled** creature takes additional damage equal to the number of Spaces moved as you slam them.

description.en:
You slam 1 **Grappled** creature into a wall within 1 Space and move up to your Speed along the wall, ending your movement within 1 Space of the wall. The target makes a Repeated Might Save against your Save DC. **Save Failure:** They gain 1 stack of **Bleeding** per Space moved.

DC Tip: Remember that you are **Slowed** while Grappling a creature, so you would move half as far. If you gain an ability that let's you move without being **Slowed**  while Grappling a creature, you could move the full distance.
description.ru:
You slam 1 **Grappled** creature into a wall within 1 Space and move up to your Speed along the wall, ending your movement within 1 Space of the wall. The target makes a Repeated Might Save against your Save DC. **Save Failure:** They gain 1 stack of **Bleeding** per Space moved.

DC Tip: Remember that you are **Slowed** while Grappling a creature, so you would move half as far. If you gain an ability that let's you move without being **Slowed**  while Grappling a creature, you could move the full distance.

description.en:
You make a target vulnerable to Physical damage.

Make a Martial Attack against the PD of a target within range, and it makes a Physical Save against your Save DC. **Hit:** The target takes the damage of your Weapon or Unarmed Strike. **Save Failure:** The target gains Physical Vulnerability (1) for 1 Round.
description.ru:
You make a target vulnerable to Physical damage.

Make a Martial Attack against the PD of a target within range, and it makes a Physical Save against your Save DC. **Hit:** The target takes the damage of your Weapon or Unarmed Strike. **Save Failure:** The target gains Physical Vulnerability (1) for 1 Round.

description.en: The Vulnerability increases by 1.
description.ru: The Vulnerability increases by 1.

description.en: The target doesn't benefit from PDR for the duration.
description.ru: The target doesn't benefit from PDR for the duration.

description.en: The target doesn't benefit from Physical Resistance for the duration.
description.ru: The target doesn't benefit from Physical Resistance for the duration.

description.en:
You swap places with a nearby ally.

You swap Spaces with a willing creature within range. If you or the target creature provoke Opportunity Attacks as a result of swapping Spaces, those Attacks are all made against you.

**Reaction:** You can spend an additional **1 SP** to perform this Maneuver as a Reaction in response to a creature within 1 Space being Attacked. When you do, you also impose DisADV on the Attack against them.
description.ru:
You swap places with a nearby ally.

You swap Spaces with a willing creature within range. If you or the target creature provoke Opportunity Attacks as a result of swapping Spaces, those Attacks are all made against you.

**Reaction:** You can spend an additional **1 SP** to perform this Maneuver as a Reaction in response to a creature within 1 Space being Attacked. When you do, you also impose DisADV on the Attack against them.

description.en: The target can immediately move up to its Speed after swapping Spaces.
description.ru: The target can immediately move up to its Speed after swapping Spaces.

description.en: Swapping Spaces doesn't provoke any Opportunity Attacks.
description.ru: Swapping Spaces doesn't provoke any Opportunity Attacks.

description.en:
You move around the area, attacking 1 creature you pass along the way.

You move a number of Spaces up to your Speed and make a Melee Martial Attack against the PD of 1 target within your Melee Range at any point during this movement. **Hit:** The target takes the damage of your Weapon or Unarmed Strike.
description.ru:
You move around the area, attacking 1 creature you pass along the way.

You move a number of Spaces up to your Speed and make a Melee Martial Attack against the PD of 1 target within your Melee Range at any point during this movement. **Hit:** The target takes the damage of your Weapon or Unarmed Strike.

description.en: This movement doesn't provoke Opportunity Attacks.
description.ru: This movement doesn't provoke Opportunity Attacks.

description.en: You gain additional movement equal to half your Speed and you can target an additional creature using the same Attack Check.
description.ru: You gain additional movement equal to half your Speed and you can target an additional creature using the same Attack Check.

description.en:
When you throw a creature using the **Throwing** rules, you can add the following Maneuver Enhancements. When you do, you are considered to be performing a Maneuver.

DC Tip: Remember, throwing a creature ends the Grapple.
description.ru:
When you throw a creature using the **Throwing** rules, you can add the following Maneuver Enhancements. When you do, you are considered to be performing a Maneuver.

DC Tip: Remember, throwing a creature ends the Grapple.

description.en: The target is thrown 1 Space further.
description.ru: The target is thrown 1 Space further.

description.en: Your throw distance isn't halved for vertical throws.
description.ru: Your throw distance isn't halved for vertical throws.

description.en: The target also falls **Prone**.
description.ru: The target also falls **Prone**.

description.en:
You bombard an area with a series of projectiles.

Make an Area Martial Attack against the AD of every target within a 2 Space Diameter Sphere that's Point of Origin is within Range. **Hit:** The target takes the damage of your Weapon.
description.ru:
You bombard an area with a series of projectiles.

Make an Area Martial Attack against the AD of every target within a 2 Space Diameter Sphere that's Point of Origin is within Range. **Hit:** The target takes the damage of your Weapon.

description.en: The damage increases by **1**.
description.ru: The damage increases by **1**.

description.en: The Diameter of the Sphere increases by 1 Space.
description.ru: The Diameter of the Sphere increases by 1 Space.

description.en: Targets within the area don't gain the benefits of 1/2 Cover against this Attack.
description.ru: Targets within the area don't gain the benefits of 1/2 Cover against this Attack.

description.en: Each creature makes a Charisma Save. **Save Failure:** The creature becomes **Hindered** until the end of their next turn.
description.ru: Each creature makes a Charisma Save. **Save Failure:** The creature becomes **Hindered** until the end of their next turn.

description.en:
You attack in a circle around you, attacking everyone within range.

Make an Area Martial Attack using a Melee Weapon or Unarmed Strike against the AD of every target within range. **Hit:** The target takes the damage of your Weapon or Unarmed Strike.

**Reach Weapon:** If you have a Reach Weapon, you can choose to increase the Aura by 1 Space. When you do, you can't Attack targets within 1 Space of you.
description.ru:
You attack in a circle around you, attacking everyone within range.

Make an Area Martial Attack using a Melee Weapon or Unarmed Strike against the AD of every target within range. **Hit:** The target takes the damage of your Weapon or Unarmed Strike.

**Reach Weapon:** If you have a Reach Weapon, you can choose to increase the Aura by 1 Space. When you do, you can't Attack targets within 1 Space of you.

description.en: The damage increases by **1**.
description.ru: The damage increases by **1**.

description.en: The Aura increases by 1 Space.
description.ru: The Aura increases by 1 Space.

description.en: Each target makes a Might Save. **Save** **Failure:** The target is pushed up to 1 Space horizontally in a direction of your choice. The target is moved 1 additional Space each time you use this Enhancement.
description.ru: Each target makes a Might Save. **Save** **Failure:** The target is pushed up to 1 Space horizontally in a direction of your choice. The target is moved 1 additional Space each time you use this Enhancement.
